payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Edge-cropped dark brown wooden cabinet front with a horizontal top rail and several recessed drawer fronts separated by vertical dividers; surface appears shadowed and slightly worn, bottom edge cut off by the crop. Photographed from close range (approx. 0.8 m).
